WASHINGTON, ID. c., Nov. 21.-
The general assembly of the
knights of Labor In convention
here passed resolution that ANY
action by congress that would per-
unit labor organizations to apply
the boycott at win would be unwise
and to the disadvantage of the
whole people,


The general assembly declared in
favor of the Sherman antitrust law
rs 1t now stands, with its provis-
Ions applicable to labor organiza-
fions as well as to combinations of
capital, The officers of the organ
ization were instructed to use all
honorable means with members OF
congress to prevent any changes
IN the laws that would make labor
, favored class.


The action of the knights of La
Dor IL continuation OF the old
light against the American Fedora
tion OF Labor. Samuel Gompers,
president Of the latter organization,
has been contending for amend.
ments to the Sherman antitrust
Law. 30 that its provisions would
not apply 70 labor organizations.
This fight led to Gompers' political
activities In behalf Of Bryan.
